zh.lifeSummary: 當John Yelverton Esquire於1355年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可拉可亞斯時，他的父親Sir Robert Yelverton Esquire28歲，母親Cecily Bardolf31歲。他於1385年與Elizabeth Read在英國英格蘭諾福爾可盧加姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他在英國英格蘭諾福爾可諾維其被列為recorder。他去世於1408年12月4日在英國英格蘭諾福爾可盧加姆享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Yelverton Esquire于1355年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可拉可亞斯时，他的父亲Sir Robert Yelverton Esquire28岁，母亲Cecily Bardolf31岁。他于1385年与Elizabeth Read在英国英格兰諾福爾可盧加姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他在英国英格兰諾福爾可諾維其被列为recorder。他去世于1408年12月4日在英国英格兰諾福爾可盧加姆享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Yelverton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon): habitational name from either of two places called Yelverton, in Norfolk or Devon. Medieval examples of the surname are from the Norfolk place, but the modern surname in Britain is associated mainly with Devon, where the earliest record of the surname is found in 1761, and is probably a substitution for Elford , an earlier form of the Devon placename. The Devon place, a hamlet in Buckland Monachorum, is not officially on record as Yelverton until the 19th century, when the Great Western Railway so named the station it built there in 1859. It is a dialect pronunciation of Elverton, which is first recorded in 1765 as an extended form of its medieval name Elford + -ton ‘town’. The Norfolk placename is recorded as Ailuertuna in 1086, and probably derives from the Old English personal name Æthelfrith or Geldfrith + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Elford
meanings: English: habitational name from Yelverton in Buckland Monachorum (Devon), recorded as Elleford in 1291 (see Yelverton ), named from the Old English personal name Ella or elle, ellen ‘elder tree’ + ford ‘ford’. The name may also derive from any of the places called Elford in Staffordshire and Northumberland, both probably from the Old English personal name Ella + ford.

variants.name: Yelvington
meanings: Probably an altered form of English   Yelverton  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Yelverton Esquire was born in 1355, in Rackheath, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Robert Yelverton Esquire, was 28 and his mother, Cecily Bardolf, was 31. He married Elizabeth Read in 1385, in Rougham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. His occupation is listed as recorder in Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. He died on 4 December 1408, in Rougham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Yelverton Esquire est né en 1355, à Rackheath, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Robert Yelverton Esquire, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Cecily Bardolf, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Read en 1385, à Rougham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Sa profession de son indiquée est recorder à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 4 décembre 1408, à Rougham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Yelverton Esquire 1355 in Rackheath, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Yelverton Esquire 28 und seine Mutter Cecily Bardolf 31. Er hat 1385 in Rougham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Read geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. sein Beruf ist als recorder in Norwich, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 4. Dezember 1408 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Rougham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Yelverton Esquire è nato il nel 1355 nel Rackheath, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Robert Yelverton Esquire, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Cecily Bardolf, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Read nel 1385, nel Rougham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. La sua occupazione è indicata come recorder nel Norwich, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 4 dicembre 1408, nel Rougham, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Yelverton Esquireが1355年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクラックヒースで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Yelverton Esquireは28歳，母Cecily Bardolfは31歳であった。1385年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクロウアムでElizabeth Readと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。イギリスイギリスノーフォルクノーウィチでの職業はrecorderと記録されている。彼は1408年12月4日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクロウアムで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Yelverton Esquire(이)가 1355년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 라크히스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Yelverton Esquire(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecily Bardolf(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1385년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 루그함에서 Elizabeth Read(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 노위치에서 recorder이었다. 그는 1408년 12월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 루그함에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Yelverton Esquire nasceu em 1355, em Rackheath, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Robert Yelverton Esquire, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Cecily Bardolf, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Read em 1385, em Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Sua profissão aparece como recorder em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 4 de dezembro de 1408, em Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Yelverton Esquire родился в 1355 г. в местности раккхит, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Yelverton Esquire было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Cecily Bardolf, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Read в 1385 г. в местности роугам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.  Он работал по профессии recorder в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 4 декабря 1408 г. в местности роугам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Yelverton Esquire nació en 1355, en Rackheath, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Robert Yelverton Esquire, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Cecily Bardolf, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Read en 1385, en Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Su ocupación registrada era recorder en Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 4 de diciembre de 1408, en Rougham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 53 años.
